dogfoodObservations.description: FIRST-PARTY: claude-hook PreToolUse output on stderr blocks allowed actions. Claude Code's hook protocol treats any stderr from PreToolUse as a blocking error. This is a real production blocker: unattended QA agents on readybench cannot commit/push without workarounds. ageRuns=2 — director escalation active.
dogfoodObservations.proposedFix: apps/cli/src/commands/claude-hook.ts: switch allow-path messages from process.stderr.write to process.stdout.write.
